description: Once touted to be the next generation of infantry weapon, boasting a powerful cartridge and cutting-edge optics, the M7 was panned by soldiers for a multitude of problems including its heavy weight, quick barrel burn, and lack of quality control.  Soon after the development of Rivtech's caseless designs, the M7 was quietly relegated to special forces armories and reserves.

The M250 is a light machine gun once meant to replace the M249 SAW.  Despite its powerful cartridge and advanced optics, the M250 suffered from several flaws as a result of the extremely high-pressure round it used along with poor quality control, and as a result was relegated to special forces armories and reserves after the development of Rivtech's caseless designs.
